title: 伏竜Sの後に・隠された水門

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I knew it. It's much easier to read the qi flow
during dirt races. ☆ That was an amazing run!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The clear, radiant spring arrives, and my task is
complete. Even so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Wooooo...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The qi is still faint, despite the race's grade. That
means...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Found it! A rupture in the dragon vein! This is it! A
great river and a raging rapid don't naturally
cross paths.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...Which means!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I've got a good grasp of my aptitude and
ability now! ☆ I know what I want to do from here
on out.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It seems that the dirt is where I belong. It's
the best kind of race to demonstrate the power of
feng shui!
choice_data_list: I see. So, the dirt track it is.
I see. So, the dirt track it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame she won't run in the Japanese Derby,
but I was prepared to arrive at this conclusion.
We should focus on dirt now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Feng shui resonates best with dirt. And so...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Entering the Japanese Derby might not be a bad
idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I was completely unprepared to hear this.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I realized why everything felt off today. It's
because a dragon vein has been severed.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, I can't just barrel ahead on dirt willy-nilly. I
have to direct qi back into dirt races from turf
first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey explains her reasoning with a
cheerful expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Remember? My dream is to show people the
wonder of feng shui and put smiles on their faces.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, while dirt might be the best surface for
demonstrating feng shui's power...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's far less popular than turf. It'd be nice if
attention shifted to dirt outside the big Classic
Triple Crown season...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I don't think that's gonna happen all of a
sudden, no matter how well I do. So to bring eyes
to feng shui, I've gotta go give the people a
sample.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's the reason the dragon vein's flow has been severed. There's a disparity between demonstrating feng shui and spreading it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
While some racers like Tarumae work steadily to
gain recognition, and others like Smart Falcon
work to promote themselves...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'm not them. Using feng shui to carve out my path is my way of doing things.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: And, I found a really good method!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, it'll attract a great deal of attention if
a dirt runner like me enters a top-class turf race
like the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I run well, I'll manage to gain a lot of attention,
right? Once all those people become interested...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can guide them to see races on dirt. The Derby
is the entrance, and the dirt is the dragon tunnel's
exit.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Here, look at the eight trigram map I drew! It's
not about choosing between black and white, but
rather a combination of the two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is like a tributary flowing
into the main river that is dirt races. Her argument
makes sense and is compelling. Furthermore...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her vision of the future is a complex graph only
she—with her expertise in feng shui—could
imagine.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
With that, I should definitely be able to bring
about the three kinds of happiness.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yes! The first is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Fans who, through watching dirt races, learn
about feng shui can improve their lives!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Next, by going from dirt to taking on the Derby, I
can show the younger generations a surprising
new path they might not have thought possible.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Finally, there are people who will be happy to
simply see me compete in the Japanese Derby.
For example...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's how I see it, but really, this is just me
satisfying my ego, or reaching for my ideal.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Dirt remains my main focus, so if you think I
should give up on the Japanese Derby, I would
understand! Give it some thought though, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she might qualify to enter, honestly, I
think achieving a victory would be tough. I have
to give this careful consideration.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
However! If I'm going to lead loads of followers
forward on my path... ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to go up against someone really turning
heads on dirt. Someone like...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae, for instance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae recently scored two consecutive
victories in regional dirt G3 races. She's fast
becoming a racer to watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she keeps this up, she has a good chance of
becoming the star of the dirt track before the
year is through.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, what races do you think Tarumae will be
entering around the end of the year?
choice_data_list: The Champions Cup is a prominent one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Champions Cup is one of only two central
dirt G1 races currently being held.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No serious dirt runner would skip a chance to
compete, which makes the odds of her running
incredibly high.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Got it! Let's set our sights on that next then!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: All right! That's decided then! All that's left is to follow the path my compass indicates! Let's do it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the end-of-year Champions Cup in
her sights, Copano Rickey sets off down a narrow,
overgrown path.
